title: GitHub Review by greptile-apps[bot]
resolution_summary: Updated the godoc comment for RenderPastePipelineINI in internal/common/plugins/plugins.go to comprehensively enumerate all validation errors that RenderPastePipeline can return (empty PipelineName, empty middleware Name or FilterFactory, unknown Position, empty BaseFilters entries, duplicate middleware Names, and an entirely empty pipeline directive), replacing the previous comment that only mentioned duplicate middleware names.
